caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white lettering. He wears large black headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and various garments hang on a rack. A logo with the text "RIDE OR DIE" appears in the bottom left, and "HEAVENLY" is visible in the bottom right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, talking and gesturing. In the latter half of the clip, he raises his right arm and hand while continuing to speak, shifting his facial expression and head position slightly as he interacts with someone off-screen.
